description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Static Code Analysis that runs on push to master, on pull requests to master, and on workflow dispatch. Run two jobs, codeql-analysis and infer-analysis, each on an ubuntu-latest environment. The codeql-analysis job checks out the repository, initializes CodeQL for C++, installs dependencies, configures and builds the project, and then runs CodeQL analysis. The infer-analysis job checks out the repository, installs Infer, configures and builds the project, runs Infer analysis, and uploads the results as a build artifact.
